title: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow][/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...
conditions: All players must have at least 19 HP
notes:
This is a [purple]risk-reward event[/purple] with three progressive decision points. Each time you Reach Deeper, you take escalating damage and unlock a better extraction reward in the next stage.

[gold]Stage 1 (Initial Choice):[/gold]
• Extract Nectar: Gain 35 Gold, event ends
• Reach Deeper: Lose 5 HP damage, progress to Stage 2

[gold]Stage 2 (After first dig):[/gold]
• Extract Nectar: Gain 75 Gold, event ends
• Reach Deeper: Lose 6 HP damage, progress to Stage 3

[gold]Stage 3 (Final choice):[/gold]
• Extract Nectar: Gain 135 Gold, event ends
• Enter the Center: Lose 7 HP damage, obtain the [aqua]Pollinous Core[/aqua] relic

[blue]Key mechanics:[/blue] The spawn condition requires all players to have at least 19 HP. The maximum possible damage is 18 HP (5 + 6 + 7), guaranteeing survival regardless of path chosen. The gold progression (35 → 75 → 135) incentivizes deeper exploration, while the final relic offers the highest strategic value. The event flavor emphasizes danger: the flower's numbing toxins mask pain, but the bone pile hints at others who ventured too far.
